title: Mechanical Engineer — Intermediate, Senior, or Lead
unit: NAU Radiant Center for Remote Sensing
summary: Support engineering across the full lifecycle of flight and ground systems for funded NASA projects. Focus on mechanical and thermal design, analysis, integration, and testing of optical, electrical, and mechanical subsystems for laboratory, field, UAS, and spaceborne instruments. Radiant may hire at Intermediate, Senior, and/or Lead levels depending on experience.
highlights: Own mechanical design, CAD, and assembly/integration & test for spaceflight hardware—from detailed drawings through lab, field, and environmental verification.
Deliver thermal modeling, TVAC and thermal test support, and clear engineering documentation for optical, electrical, and mechanical subsystems.
Plan and execute structural and vibration analysis and ground test campaigns that align with NASA program expectations and mission environments.
